articles.title: It's the worst day for Australian stock markets since 2020 - investingLive
articles.description: Today is now worse than Liberation Day for Australian stock markets. . The ASX 200 is down 4.3%, breaking the April 7, 2025 drop of 4.
articles.content:
Today is now worse than Liberation Day for Australian stock markets.
The ASX 200 is down 4.3%, breaking the April 7, 2025 drop of 4.2%. In March 2020, it had drops of 9.7% and 7.4% which were the wo… [+1433 chars]
